prompt: A dramatic ultra-wide aerial tiny-planet photograph of Canakkale, Turkey, rendered as a full 360-degree stereographic projection so the city and waterfront form a compact spherical world surrounded by a swirling ring of blue sky and white clouds. The viewpoint is high above the shoreline in bright daytime with crisp summer light, realistic colors, and strong photographic detail. Place the large hillside sign reading Canakkale prominently across the center of the miniature planet. On the left-upper side of the sphere, show a tall pale stone clock tower with a small red Turkish flag at the top, surrounded by dense urban blocks with red-tiled roofs and mid-rise buildings. On the right side, include a vivid blue harbor with 2 white passenger ferries docked along the waterfront and a long curving coastline extending into the distance. In the lower-right quadrant, feature the monumental dark wooden Trojan horse statue on a circular plaza. In the lower-left quadrant, include the large rectangular concrete memorial structure set within green parkland. Cover the planet with winding pedestrian paths, lawns, trees, and landscaped gardens, with city streets and waterfront promenades visible around the edges. Use a highly realistic drone-photo look, deep depth of field, sharp textures, slightly exaggerated fisheye distortion from the tiny-planet projection, and a majestic travel-poster composition emphasizing the contrast between the green park, historic landmarks, and sparkling sea.
